name: device-pullback
title: devicePullback
description: The outgoing scene starts as full-bleed UI scaled up, then pulls back to 1x while a minimal device bezel (laptop or phone) draws in around it — so the cut lands on the content framed inside a device mockup. A pull-back-to-reveal-the-product beat for launch and feature reels. Onda-original.
pickWhen: the product is the reveal — feature launch, app demo finale. Lands the outgoing UI inside a `device-frame`; not a generic transition.
